Package com.icarus.events

package com.icarus.events
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AdministratorDashboardActivity
    Provides the administrator dashboard for managing application data.
    AdministratorDashboardEventArrayAdapter
    ArrayAdapter used in the administrator dashboard to display events in a ListView.
    AdministratorDashboardTest
    Instrumented UI tests for AdministratorDashboardActivity.
    AdministratorDashboardUserArrayAdapter
    Adapter used in the administrator dashboard to display users in a ListView.
    EntrantEventListActivity
    Activity that displays the list of available events for entrants.
    EntrantEventListArrayAdapter
    Adapter used to display events in the entrant event list.
    EntrantEventListTest
    Instrumented UI tests for EntrantEventListActivity.
    EntrantWaitlistTest
    Test class for verifying the functionality of an entrant joining and leaving the waitlist for events.
    Event
    Represents an event in the application.
    EventDetailsActivity
    Activity that displays the details of a single Event.
    EventDetailsAdapter
    Adapter to display an Event's fields in a ListView using ArrayAdapter.
    EventDetailsTest
    Instrumented UI tests for EventDetailsActivity.
    EventField
    Represents a single field of an Event, with a name and value.
    EventHistoryActivity
    Activity that displays the event history for the current user.
    EventHistoryListArrayAdapter
    Adapter used to display a user's event history in a ListView.
    EventHistoryTest
    Instrumented UI tests for EventHistoryActivity.
    ExampleUnitTest
    Example local unit test, which will execute on the development machine (host).
    FirestoreCollections
     
    MainActivity
    Entry activity for the application.
    NavigationBarActivity
    Base activity class that provides a reusable navigation bar for subclasses.
    OraganizerEntrantViewListArrayAdapter
     
    OrganizerCreateEventActivity
    Activity that allows organizers to create a new event.
    OrganizerCreateEventTest
    Instrumented UI tests for OrganizerCreateEventActivity.
    OrganizerManageEventActivity
     
    OrganizerViewEntrantsOnWaitingListActivity
    Activity that allows organizers to view the entrants on the waiting, selected, rejected, and registered list .
    OrganizerViewEntrantsTest
    Instrumented UI tests for OrganizerViewEntrantsOnWaitingListActivity.
    SampleAttendeesActivity
    Activity that allows an organizer to randomly sample attendees from the event entrants subcollection.
    User
    Represents a user in the application.
    UserProfileActivity
    Activity that allows a user to view and update their profile information.
    UserProfileTest
    Instrumented UI tests for UserProfileActivity.
    UserRegistrationActivity
    Activity that allows a new user to register in the application.
    UserRegistrationTest
    Instrumented UI tests for UserRegistrationActivity.
    UserSession
    Singleton class for storing the currently logged-in user across the app session.
    UserSettingsActivity
    Screen for users to manage personal settings and account deletion.
    UserSettingsTest
    Instrumented UI tests for UserSettingsActivity.
